label: Plugin pipeline architecture (mem2)
Two-stage concept extraction (solution→pseudocode→concepts)
v3a extraction prompt (0% leakage)
Domain-specific rendering (cues_only math, full code)
LCB concept benefit (+5pp at 80%)
Technique concepts neutral/harmful on math
Failure mode taxonomy: knowledge gap vs reasoning depth
Similar-problem retrieval for math
Proof strategy hints (deeper than technique names)
Worked examples (full solution paths of related problems)
Richer concept representation (bridge shallow↔specific)
Similar-problem retrieval for math
rationale: Merged into I05 — same approach as I03

label: Worked examples (full solution paths of related problems)
rationale: Merged into I05 — same approach as I01

label: Richer concept representation (bridge shallow↔specific)
rationale: Negative precedent from v3c, incremental, no new mechanism

label: Proof strategy hints (deeper than technique names)
rationale: Cheap fallback comparison — weak mechanistic story but low cost to test

label: Episodic memory: similar-problem retrieval with worked solutions
decision: Merge I01+I03 into unified episodic memory approach
rationale: Strongest mechanistic case: episodic memory addresses reasoning depth differently than semantic memory (technique names). MemP finding supports trajectories > scripts.

label: TF-IDF retrieval viable for formulaic math problems (recurrences, functional eq, series)
Episodic memory: similar-problem retrieval with worked solutions
rationale: Random control matched episodic (both +5pp). Retrieval relevance does not help. Context warm-up effect only.

label: Context warm-up: any worked math solution improves math performance
rationale: Smoketest +5pp was noise. At n=108 (d1-d9): baseline 67.6%, math-warmup 65.7%, problem-only 66.7%. All conditions equivalent. No warm-up effect exists.

label: GPQA Diamond: concept memory for graduate-level science QA
rationale: Pivot from math (all negative) to science domain. Flash baseline ~84%, failure mode plausibly knowledge gaps. Needs MCQ evaluator + science concept extraction.

label: BFCL-V4: concept memory for API/function calling
rationale: Pivot from math to tool-use domain. Flash baseline ~67%, failure mode = API knowledge gaps — same as LCB. Needs function-call evaluator + tool-use concept extraction.
